name: Ikki68 Aurora
description: Polycarbonate 65-percent gasket board from Wuque Studio with a frosted translucent case that diffuses per-key RGB into a soft glow effect. The PC case and gasket mount combine to produce a softer, bouncier typing feel than aluminum boards in the same bracket. An accessible entry into polycarbonate builds for hobbyists who want RGB without a heavy metal chassis.
